case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. DARREL LEVON REED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT REED, DARREL LEVON DBA ; STATIONARY SCAFFOLD ERECTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REED, DARREL LEVON DBA ; STATIONARY SCAFFOLD ERECTION $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.88 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $708.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
